summary: The diff implements nearly all required features: backend Customer record extension (REQ-1), useMarkPaymentSuccess hook (REQ-2), AdminPage Mark as Paid button (REQ-3), ReceiptPage with required fields (REQ-4), styling with print CSS (REQ-5), Print/Download buttons (REQ-6), mobile number search (REQ-7), PaymentPage auto-redirect (REQ-8), and App.tsx route registration (REQ-9). However, there are notable gaps in REQ-6 (Download Slip named PDF generation) and a separate migration module was added outside of main.mo contrary to constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: The 'Download Slip' button must use a client-side HTML-to-PDF library (html2canvas + jsPDF) or print-to-PDF to generate and download a PDF named 'VOC-Receipt-{receiptId}.pdf'.
missing_requirements.reason: The ReceiptPage.tsx diff is truncated and no html2canvas or jsPDF import or usage is visible. There is no confirmed evidence of a named PDF download with the pattern VOC-Receipt-{receiptId}.pdf being generated client-side.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate backend/migration.mo module file was added to handle data migration from old Customer records to new ones with paymentStatus/paymentDate/receiptId fields.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint explicitly states all Motoko changes must remain in backend/main.mo as a single actor. A separate migration module file was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A filterPayment dropdown (all/pending/paid) was added to AdminPage for filtering customers by payment status.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only asked for a Mark as Paid button, loading state, Paid badge, and receiptId display in admin rows. No payment-status filter UI was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A Receipt external link button was added in AdminPage rows for paid customers to navigate to ReceiptPage.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only specifies showing a Paid badge and receiptId in the admin row. No receipt navigation link from AdminPage was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A paidCustomers stat counter was added to the AdminPage dashboard stats section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only specified per-row UI changes for payment status. No dashboard stat for paid customers count was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useGetAllCustomers, a separate public query hook with query key 'customers-public', was added to useQueries.ts.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only asked for the useMarkPaymentSuccess mutation hook to be added. A separate public customers query hook was not requested.
